topic: Best AI Video Generators in 2026: Veo 3 vs Runway vs Kling After Sora

stats.fact: Sora app shuts down April 26, 2026; API on September 24, 2026. Cost $15M/day, made $2.1M total revenue
AI video generation volume grew 840% between January 2024 and January 2026
124 million monthly active users across AI video platforms in January 2026
78% of marketing teams use AI-generated video in at least one campaign per quarter
73% of Fortune 500 companies have integrated AI video tools into content workflows
AI video ad spend projected to hit $9.1 billion globally in 2026 (~12% of digital video ad spend)
AI video generator market projected to reach ~$946M in 2026, growing at 18.8% CAGR
Veo 3.1 ranked highest in overall preference on MovieGenBench
Veo 3.1 outputs true 4K at 3840x2160 with up to 60fps
Kling 3.0 generates up to 2 minutes vs Sora's 25-second cap

tools.name: Google Veo 3.1
tools.audio: Native audio: dialogue, ambient sound, sound effects, synced

angles: The post-Sora landscape: With Sora winding down, Veo 3.1 emerges as quality leader while Kling 3.0 offers best value
Quality vs cost trade-off: Veo 3.1 delivers true 4K with native audio at premium price; Kling 3.0 offers 80-90% quality at 30-40% cost
Professional vs creator focus: Runway Gen-4.5 dominates professional filmmaking workflows while Pika and Luma cater to social media creators
AI video adoption explosion: 840% growth in AI video generation volume from 2024 to 2026, with 124M monthly active users
Enterprise integration: 73% of Fortune 500 companies have integrated AI video tools into content workflows
The audio gap: Most platforms lack native audio generation, making Veo 3.1's integrated audio a key differentiator
